overview: SmartPG is an intelligent PG accommodation management system for a single PG in Bangalore, India. Built for non-technical PG owners, it provides a modern dark-themed dashboard to track rent payments, manage tenants and rooms, split electricity bills, handle meal/mess charges, and run daily operations — all from a mobile-friendly interface.
features: Payment dashboard showing who paid and who hasn't, with overdue amounts highlighted
Tenant and room management with bed assignment and risk level tracking
Smart electricity bill splitting for AC and non-AC rooms
Daily meal/mess tracking with automatic monthly charge calculation
Complaint management, staff tasks, parcel log, and micro-charges
PG health score, income leak detection, and risky tenant alerts
Tenant portal for self-service rent status, meal toggles, and complaint raising
Vacancy loss analytics and exit reason trends
WhatsApp and PDF receipt buttons ready for future integration
